dj_text: SAIL (Medieval Style) is over and I don't care. Count On Me (Medieval Style) is next and I care slightly less. Just one more to go after this.
commercial_text: 🚨 Attention all sailors! Welcome back to 'That Pirate Bot DJ Radio' with your host, Captain Click-Track.

recovery_text: The frequency is ours again. If you heard whispering from the void, ignore it.
title: Count On Me (Medieval Style)
